title: SALUD DIABETES MANAGEMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: THE DALLES CLINIC SALUD DIABETES MANAGEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance in navigating lifestyle changes to reduce diabetes risks. Program participants receive coaching, personal nutrition care plans, and medication management in one-on-one or group settings. 1040 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Individuals who are established Community One Health patients Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 296-4610 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-4610 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Group Counseling * Diabetes Health/Disability Related Support Groups Individual Counseling * Diabetes Medication Information/Management * Diabetes Nutrition Education * Diabetes Peer Counseling * Diabetes Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - INSURANCE ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
